title: senecio rahmeri
intro: Senecio rahmeri, also known as Grey Groundsel, is a perennial herb in the daisy family, native to China and parts of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio rahmeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of allergies, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Senecio rahmeri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
